name: Sheet Pan Eggs with Spinach and Ham
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 30 minutes

ingredients.item: frozen spinach, thawed, drained, and chopped

method: Preheat oven to 300°F (149°C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the eggs, milk, and smoked paprika. Season with salt, pepper, and onion powder.
Make sure the spinach have been drained of most of its water. Fold in the spinach, cheddar cheese, and ham.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking sheet. Cook for 30 minutes or until set and golden-brown.
